Carns

System / Location · First seen 3301-07-08 · 4 mentions
Active: 3301-07-08 → 3301-07-24
Related Entities

Humason Orbital
Mentions Timeline (4 articles)
3301-07-24
Carns Economic Success
Chief Communications Officer Ramon Lamor announced the successful upgrade of Humason Orbital's economy to high-tech. He dismissed previous civic disruption reports as isolated elements who have since been brought onboard with the economic plan. The development promises a new era of prosperity for the Carns system.
3301-07-16
Grand Slave Sale in Carns Ends
The grand slave sale at Humason Orbital in Carns has ended. Deputy Communications Officer Ramon Lamor declared it a success but refused to provide numbers. A report analysing the sale and planned market changes will be presented next week. Reports of unrest have emerged since the announcement that Carns will transform its economy to high-tech goods and services.
3301-07-09
Grand Sale of Slaves in Carns
Following the announcement of Carns' economic shift from mining to high-tech, Deputy Communications Officer Ramon Lamor outlined plans to retrain or sell the system's imperial slave workforce. Slaves with relevant skills are being prepared for new roles, while others will be sold at Humason Orbital with a substantial discount financed by the authorities until all slaves find new placements.
3301-07-08
Ambitious Plans for Carns
Humason Orbital in Carns announced plans to shift from mining to high-tech operations after reports suggested mining would become uneconomical. Deputy Communications Officer Ramon Lamor outlined an acquisition programme for robotics to support new product lines, replacing extraction and industrial concerns. Existing businesses will receive financial and logistical support during the transition.
